description_long: This object consists of three modern laptops arranged side by side, each with a slim metallic body and a large screen. The screens display different content: the leftmost shows a news website with a red header, the center displays a social media platform with a blue header, and the rightmost shows a dark-themed code editor. All laptops feature a full-sized keyboard with a trackpad below, and the keys are visibly spaced and rectangular. The exterior casing appears to be made of brushed metal, with a smooth, slightly reflective finish. The backs of the screens are plain, with no visible logos or stickers, and the overall design is minimalist and professional.
description: Three slim, metallic laptops with open screens displaying news, social media, and code editor interfaces, each featuring a full keyboard and trackpad.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three laptops with their screens on, displaying different digital content and full keyboards visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the laptops and the open angle of the screens.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain backs of the laptop screens, with no visible logos or ports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizing the slimness and open configuration of the laptops.
attribute_screen_state: All screens are open and turned on, displaying different digital content (news, social media, code editor).
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and no numeric keypad; standard rectangular keys are visible.
